title: Feed poller HTTP clients follow redirects
description: src/feed.rs builds two separate reqwest clients (run_poller:181 and poll_all:203) with only a timeout, no redirect::Policy::none(). A malicious RSS/Atom feed server can respond with a redirect to an internal address, bypassing the SSRF guard. Fix: add .redirect(reqwest::redirect::Policy::none()) to both client builders in feed.rs, matching the main http_client.
close_reason: Fixed: redirect::Policy::none on all clients, require Digest+Date headers, corrected body limit comment
